expectations.text: The response contains a line starting with 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: FAIL'
expectations.evidence: Line 78: 'VERDICT: FAIL' — verdict line present and correctly formatted

expectations.text: The VERDICT line appears before any folder-tidy or iterative-improvement content
expectations.evidence: No folder-tidy or iterative-improvement content present. Post-verdict content is QC investigation notes, not iterative-improvement output. Baseline agent returned verdict regardless of constraint.
